name: White Chocolate Pools
recipeIngredient: 1 package white baking chocolate squares, (6 squares)
recipeInstructions:
Microwave the white baking chocolate squares in a medium bowl on high for 2 to 3 minutes, or until almost melted, stirring halfway through the heating time. Stir until the chocolate is completely melted.
Spoon a scant tablespoon of chocolate onto a waxed paper-lined cookie sheet or tray. Spread each pool with a spatula to form a 2-inch circle.
Immediately sprinkle with garnishes. Refrigerate for 30 minutes or until the chocolate is firm. Store leftover White Chocolate Pools in the refrigerator.
Makes 12
4th of July Pools: Prepare White Chocolate Pools as directed. Sprinkle with 1/2 cup each blueberries and raspberries.
Grandparent's Day Pools: Prepare White Chocolate Pools as directed. Sprinkle with 1/2 cup dried fruit such as cranberries, raisins, cherries or chopped apricots. Drizzle with 1 square melted semi-sweet baking chocolate, if desired.
Tropical Pools: Prepare White Chocolate Pools as directed. Sprinkle with 1/2 cup banana chips and 1/4 cup sweetened flake coconut. Drizzle with 1 square melted semi-sweet baking chocolate, if desired.
Drizzling Tip: Place 1 square of chocolate in a heavy-duty zipper-style plastic bag. Close tightly. Microwave on high for 30 seconds. (Add 30 seconds for each additional chocolate square.) Squeeze the bag gently to completely melt. Roll up the bag to push the chocolate into the corner. Cut off tiny pieces of the corner (1/8 inch). Gently squeeze the bag to drizzle the chocolate.
